center.name: 哈马黑拉岛
center.summary: 哈马黑拉岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括华氏秧鸡、Halmahera boobook、Sombre kingfisher等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Indonesian islands of Halmahera, Ternate and Bacan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Morotai, Halmahera and Bacan Islands, Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sombre kingfisher occurs only on Halmahera, where it inhabits primary forest (frequently close to clearings), swamp-forest, mature secondary woodland, and mangroves

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests
